'''Blood Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Composed of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], it saw [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]] in the [[Airam sector/Legends|Airam sector]] where it was assigned to the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Crucible (MC80 Star Cruiser)|''Crucible'']]. When the ''Crucible'' was sent to rescue factory personnel in the [[Mobetta system/Legends|Mobetta system]] [[Attack on Soren|from an Imperial attack]], Blood Squadron went with it. Upon arrival, the unit was given the task of driving away, or at least warding off, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]]' command ship, the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']]. However, despite escort by [[Sundancer Squadron]] in its [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]], it was destroyed together with the factory and ''Crucible''.
